articles.title: Matt Damon Says Christopher Nolan Filmed a 60-Foot Cyclops Puppet in a Real-Life Cave for The Odyssey, Rather Than Just Relying on CGI

Christopher Nolan's The Prestige Is Returning to Theaters

filtered_articles.title: Amazon Has Kicked Off a Sale on Select 4K Steelbooks – Save on Back to the Future, Jurassic World Trilogy, and More
filtered_articles.description: Amazon has launched a new sale on a selection of 4K steelbooks. For a limited time, you can score big discounts on Back to the Future, the Jurassic World Trilogy, and more.

filtered_articles.title: Preorders Are Live for Brand New Pokémon LEGO Sets, Launching in August and October
filtered_articles.description: LEGO has revealed a new selection of Pokémon LEGO sets: Arcanine, Munchlax, Rayquaza, the Iconic Trainer Moments Poké Ball, and an Up-Scaled Red Minifigure. These are all available to preorder right now and set to release in both August and October.

filtered_articles.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Steam Pre-Orders Have Already Beaten Skull & Bones' Lifetime Sales, Analyst Claims
filtered_articles.description: Launch sales projections for Ubisoft's Assassin's Creed Black Flag remake look like a huge improvement on Assassin's Creed Shadows, the franchise's most recent release.
